story.iWant: to generate a script for a lesson with one click
story.soThat: I can quickly create meditation content

task.title: Create GenerateScriptButton component
task.subtask: Create src/components/GenerateScriptButton.tsx
Implement button variants: primary (Generate Script), secondary (Regenerate Script)
Add sparkle icon (Sparkles from lucide-react) for idle state
Add spinner icon (Loader2 from lucide-react) for loading state
Implement disabled state with "Generating..." text
Add aria-label for accessibility ("Generate script for [lesson title]")

task.title: Create LessonScriptGeneration container
task.subtask: Create src/containers/Main/LessonScriptGeneration/ directory structure
Create connect.ts with script generation mutation
Create constants.ts with eligible statuses array
Create types.ts for container-local types
Implement useScriptGeneration hook with mutation logic

task.title: Integrate button into LessonListItem
task.subtask: Import GenerateScriptButton into src/components/LessonListItem.tsx
Pass lesson status and mutation handlers as props
Determine button variant based on lesson status
Ensure responsive behavior (icon-only on mobile via Tailwind classes)

task.title: Implement script generation mutation
task.subtask: Add mutation: $api.useMutation('post', '/api/courses/{slug}/lessons/{id}/generate-script')
Handle successful mutation response
Implement error handling with toast notification
Invalidate course query to trigger refetch

task.title: Add toast notifications
task.subtask: Show "Script generation started..." toast on mutation start
Leverage existing polling toasts from Story 3.6 for completion
Show error toast with API error message on failure

task.title: Testing and validation
task.subtask: Run bun typecheck - verify no type errors
Run bun lint:fix - verify no lint errors
Manual test: verify button appears for PENDING lessons
Manual test: verify "Regenerate" appears for SCRIPT_COMPLETED
Manual test: verify loading state during generation
Manual test: verify toast on generation start
Manual test: verify disabled state for SCRIPT_GENERATING
Manual test: verify mobile responsiveness (icon-only)

criterion.given: I am viewing a lesson with status PENDING or a status containing FAILED
criterion.then: I see a "Generate Script" button (cyan #7dcfff, with sparkle icon) clearly visible in the lesson row actions area

criterion.given: The lesson has status SCRIPT_COMPLETED, AUDIO_GENERATING, or AUDIO_COMPLETED
criterion.then: The "Generate Script" button shows as "Regenerate Script" (outline style) with secondary styling (transparent background, cyan border)
The button is disabled with "Generating..." text, a spinner icon replaces the sparkle icon, the button shows a loading state

criterion.when: I click "Generate Script" on an eligible lesson
criterion.then: The button immediately shows a loading spinner, lesson status changes to SCRIPT_GENERATING, status badge shows pulse animation (from Story 3.6), toast notification appears: "Script generation started..."
Existing polling mechanism (Story 3.6) detects status changes; when status changes to SCRIPT_COMPLETED, a success toast appears; when status changes to a FAILED state, an error toast appears

criterion.given: The API returns an error when triggering generation
criterion.then: An error toast appears with the error message, the button returns to its idle state (not disabled), the lesson status remains unchanged

criterion.given: I view the lesson list on a mobile device
criterion.then: The generate button is accessible (touch target ≥ 44px), button text may be hidden with only the icon visible on smaller screens

doc.title: Senda CMS Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Business logic goes in connect.ts (mutation, handlers). Presentation goes in component files. The LessonListItem component orchestrates the button display.

doc.title: Senda CMS Architecture Document
doc.snippet: All API interactions use auto-generated, type-safe hooks from the backend OpenAPI specification. Use $api.useMutation for mutations with onSuccess/onError callbacks.

doc.title: Senda CMS Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Toast Notifications (Sonner): Success green toast 4s auto-dismiss, Error red toast 6s auto-dismiss. API errors displayed via toast.error().

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Primary: Solid cyan (#7dcfff) background, dark text. Secondary (Regenerate): Transparent background, cyan border, cyan text. Disabled: Grey background, cursor not-allowed.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Success toasts positioned top-right, auto-dismiss 4 seconds. Error toasts auto-dismiss 6 seconds. Use Sparkles icon for generate action, Loader2 with animate-spin for loading.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Keyboard accessible (Tab + Enter/Space). Focus state must show visible cyan outline (2px). Touch target minimum 44x44px on mobile. Use aria-label, aria-busy, disabled attributes.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: Story 4.1: Generate Script Button and Status. Mutation: $api.useMutation('post', '/api/lessons/{id}/generate-script'). Rely on Story 3.6 polling to detect completion.

doc.title: Story 3.6: Real-time Status Indicators
doc.snippet: Polling infrastructure already implemented in CourseDetail/connect.ts with 3000ms interval. Status change detection uses previousLessonsRef. Toast notifications for COMPLETED and FAILED transitions already in place.

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: One-click script generation with progress tracking. Preview generated scripts. Edit capabilities post-generation. Version history.

file.reason: Component to be modified - add GenerateScriptButton to actions column alongside edit/delete buttons
Existing status badge with pulse animation for GENERATING states. Defines LessonStatus type used for button state logic.
Main orchestration container with polling logic. Script generation mutation can be added here or in a dedicated container.
Contains GENERATING_STATUSES array used to determine button disabled state.
OpenAPI clients for authenticated and public API calls. Use $api.useMutation for script generation.
Type definitions exported from OpenAPI schemas including Lesson and ScriptGenerationResponse.
Auto-generated API types for /api/courses/{slug}/lessons/{id}/generate-script endpoint with path parameters slug (string) and id (number).

ecosystem.name: node
ecosystem.package: Auto-generated React Query hooks from OpenAPI
Zod resolver for React Hook Form

constraints.constraint: Container Pattern: All business logic in connect.ts, presentation in component files. Never put mutations or API calls directly in components.
OpenAPI-First: Use auto-generated $api hooks for all API interactions. Never write manual fetch calls.
Type imports: Use 'import type { X } from ...' for type-only imports.
Path alias: Use @/* for imports from src/ directory.
Run bun typecheck before committing. Pre-commit hooks run ESLint, Prettier, and typecheck.
Use Tailwind utility classes inline. No CSS modules.
API endpoint is POST /api/courses/{slug}/lessons/{id}/generate-script with path params slug (string) and id (number).
Primary buttons use cyan (#7dcfff). Disabled buttons use grey background. Touch targets minimum 44px on mobile.
All buttons must have aria-label. Use aria-busy for loading states. Keyboard accessible via Tab + Enter/Space.

interface.name: Lesson type
interface.signature: components['schemas']['LessonData'] - includes id, title, status, courseSlug, etc.

interface.name: $api.useMutation
interface.signature: useMutation(method, path, { onSuccess?, onError?, onMutate? }) - Type-safe mutation with callbacks

tests.standards: Testing follows project standards: Type checking with bun typecheck, linting with bun lint:fix, manual testing for UI interactions and visual states. Unit tests use Vitest. Test files use .test.ts(x) suffix. Focus on button states, mutation flow, toast notifications.

ideas.idea: Test GenerateScriptButton renders correct variant based on lesson status (PENDING → primary, SCRIPT_COMPLETED → secondary, SCRIPT_GENERATING → disabled)
Test mutation triggers correctly with lesson ID and course slug, button shows loading state
Integration: verify polling from Story 3.6 shows completion toast when status changes
Test error handling: API error shows toast.error(), button returns to idle state
Test responsive behavior: button shows icon-only on mobile breakpoint
